data.title: DDoS Protection
data.description: Defense mechanisms to protect against Distributed Denial-of-Service attacks.
data.technical_spec: Uses Google's DDoS protection services like Shielded VMs and Project Shield.

data.title: Secure Video Streaming
data.description: Security protocols to ensure video and data streams are encrypted.
data.technical_spec: Utilizes HTTPS with forward secrecy and other cryptographic measures.

data.title: User Access Control
data.description: Mechanisms to protect user accounts and sensitive information.
data.technical_spec: Involves two-factor authentication (2FA) and OAuth 2.0 protocols.

data.title: Content Moderation AI
data.description: Tools for automatic detection and flagging of inappropriate content.
data.technical_spec: Employs machine learning models trained on vast datasets to detect violations.

data.title: Phishing and Malware Detection
data.description: Systems to identify and prevent phishing attempts and malware spread.
data.technical_spec: Utilizes machine learning and threat intelligence feeds to detect malicious activities.
